landing.heroSub: Track your clean time, save money, and celebrate every milestone.
landing.feature1Desc: See exactly how long you've been clean, second by second.
landing.feature2Desc: Calculate how much money you've saved and set a goal.
landing.feature3Desc: Write how you feel each day. The process matters too.
landing.feature4Desc: Celebrate every milestone: 1 day, 1 week, 1 month and more.
landing.feature5Desc: When a craving hits hard, press the button and remember why you started.
landing.feature6Desc: Relapses, streaks, patterns. Everything saved so you can learn from it.

auth.emailSent: We've sent you a verification link. Check your inbox.
auth.resetSubtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSentDetail: Check your inbox and click the link.
auth.resetError: Couldn't send the link. Is the email address correct?

onboarding.title: One last step
onboarding.subtitle: We need a couple of details to personalise your experience.
onboarding.quitDateHelp: If it was today, leave today's date.
onboarding.dailyCostLabel: How much did you spend per day?
onboarding.dailyCostHelp: Approximate. We use this to calculate your savings.
onboarding.porrosLabel: How many joints did you smoke per day?
onboarding.reasonsLabel: Why do you want to be clean?
onboarding.reasonsPlaceholder: Type a reason and press Enter
onboarding.reasonsHelp: You'll see these when you need them most.

dashboard.crisisTip: Cravings last between 5 and 20 minutes. Breathe.
dashboard.relapseConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to log a relapse?
dashboard.relapseConfirmText: This will reset your counter, but your history is kept. That matters too.
dashboard.noAchievements: Your first achievements are just around the corner.
dashboard.shareProgressText: I've been clean for {days} days 🌿 and saved {amount}. With Limpio App!
dashboard.milestoneText: You've reached {days} clean days. Keep it up!
quotes: Every clean day is a win.
You don't have to be perfect, just keep trying.
The craving will pass. Your decision stays.
You are stronger than any craving.

diary.title: Diary
diary.writePlaceholder: Write what you feel, think, or what happened today...
diary.noEntries: No entries yet. Write your first thought.
diary.emptySubtitle: Write how you feel. The process matters.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Every step counts.
achievements.time_1h_desc: You've made it through your first clean hour.
achievements.time_24h_desc: 24 hours without smoking. You did it!
achievements.time_3d_desc: Your body is starting to feel the difference.
achievements.time_1w_desc: 7 days clean. Nicotine is out of your system.
achievements.time_2w_desc: Sleep and appetite are noticeably better.
achievements.time_1m_desc: 30 days. Your brain is building new pathways.
achievements.time_3m_desc: Cravings are rare now. You've changed.
achievements.time_6m_desc: Half a year clean. You're an inspiration.
achievements.diary_1_desc: You wrote your first diary entry.
achievements.diary_30_desc: 30 entries. The diary is your ally.
achievements.crisis_survived_desc: You used the help button and made it through.
achievements.savings_10_desc: €10 that used to go up in smoke.
achievements.savings_50_desc: €50. What will you spend it on?
achievements.savings_100_desc: €100. A night out, a concert, whatever you want.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.noData: Not enough data yet. Keep going!

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: This action is irreversible. All your data will be deleted.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download a PDF report with your progress, achievements and diary.

pwa.installSubtitle: Add the app to your home screen for quick access.

offline.title: No connection
offline.message: No internet connection. Your progress is saved.

notFound.message: This page doesn't exist or was removed.

health.title: Health improvements
health.subtitle: What's happening in your body right now
health.h1h: Heart rate and blood pressure back to normal
health.h8h: Blood CO2 levels return to normal
health.h24h: Heart attack risk starts to drop
health.h1y: Coronary disease risk cut in half
